title: Spicy Syrian Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish, perfect for any meal.
instructions: Heat 2 cups of water in a saucepan.
Add 1 tsp of salt and bring to a boil.
Add 1 cup of Syrian rice and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 15-20 minutes or until the water has been absorbed.
In a separate pan, heat 1 tsp of oil over medium heat.
Add 1 tsp of Chapssalgaru spice blend and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Stir in 1 tsp of sweet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Fluff the cooked rice with a fork and stir in the spice mixture.
Transfer the rice to a serving dish and garnish with optional decadent to taste.
